opportunity.title: Make plugin descriptions in marketplace.json more user-friendly
opportunity.why: Issue related to AI agents/MCP/plugins — kbot could contribute
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider contributing code or opening a PR

actions.draft: User-friendly descriptions are crucial for plugin adoption, but be wary of overly verbose explanations – agents often parse these descriptions for semantic matching during tool selection. Consider incorporating structured metadata (e.g., capabilities, input types) alongside the narrative text; this allows for both human readability and machine-driven discovery. It’s a common tradeoff between appeal and automated routing.
actions.reasoning: I've designed plugin marketplaces and agent orchestration layers, so I understand the interplay between discoverability and technical implementation.
